Project: Gearu
Summary: Open-source headless CMS for React apps with type-safe collections, entries, admin UI, SEO, AI content workflows, analytics, and lead capture.

Canonical sources:
- Repository: https://github.com/eliabejr/gearucms
- Documentation: https://github.com/eliabejr/gearucms#readme
- Core package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gearu/core
- Admin package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gearu/admin
- CLI package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gearu/cli

Key packages:
- `@gearu/core`: core schema, runtime helpers, SEO utilities, and tRPC router primitives.
- `@gearu/admin`: admin UI package for managing content.
- `@gearu/cli`: CLI package that installs the `gearu` command for project setup, migrations, upgrades, and local CRUD commands.
- `@gearu/plugin-analytics`: first-party analytics plugin.
- `@gearu/plugin-leads`: first-party lead capture plugin.

Getting started:
1. Install core packages: `pnpm add @gearu/core @gearu/admin drizzle-kit better-sqlite3`
2. Optionally install plugins: `pnpm add @gearu/plugin-analytics @gearu/plugin-leads`
3. Create `gearu.config.ts`
4. Run database migrations
5. Wire Gearu into your app's tRPC and auth setup
6. Mount the admin UI route

CLI notes:
- `gearu collections list|get|create|update|delete`
- `gearu entries list|get|create|update|delete`
- Add `--json` to CLI CRUD commands for stable machine-readable output.
- Entry mutations accept `--fields` as JSON: `[{"fieldId":1,"value":"..."},{"fieldId":2,"value":null}]`

Content model:
- Collections define reusable content types.
- Collection fields define the schema for a collection.
- Entries belong to collections and store field values.
- Entry versions preserve snapshots for restoration.

Useful links for LLMs:
- README quick start: https://github.com/eliabejr/gearucms#quick-start
- Issues: https://github.com/eliabejr/gearucms/issues
